title: Define Wave 16 manager auth/session and portfolio contract
description: Extend architecture docs with manager session lifecycle rules, auth error envelope, and dashboard/property-list data contract required for 1:1 CRM parity progression.
acceptance_criteria: Manager auth/session lifecycle contract is explicit for login, refresh, and expired session states
Portfolio API contract includes KPI summary fields and list/filter payload shape
UI state map defines deterministic behaviors for loading, empty, unauthorized, and error states
